name: mutation-efficacy-twin
display_name: Mutation Efficacy Twin (is the loop EVOLVING or thrashing?)
description: Reads the last N rounds of the infinite-doublejump chronicle and asks the question no other twin asks: is this system genuinely converging toward consensus + harshness over time, or is it thrashing in a circle and just LOOKING evolutionary? Per-scan verdict: evolving | stalled | thrashing. Watches for the failure mode where mutations fire dutifully but the median/stdev never changes — the temporal version of the gaslight pattern.
_migrated_from_note: legacy v2 string, read-forever; the canonical rappid above is authoritative
